_note: W5.4 — committed baseline targets for k6 regression gating. These are the numbers the nightly loadtest CI compares k6-summary.json against. If a PR causes any metric to regress beyond `toleratePct`, the check-baseline.js gate fails and the PR is blocked. Numbers are sourced from the last clean full-scenario run on staging and are intentionally conservative so cold-dyno noise on Render doesn't false-alarm.

_schema.max: hard ceiling — if the observed value > max, fail
_schema.toleratePct: % regression tolerance over the stored baseline; used to catch gradual drift
